faithfulness_details.claim: Users report AI features are now unavoidable and permanently visible in the UI, with an 'ask AI' text field appearing prominently even when unwanted
Users report that AI integration has replaced or degraded their customized homepage layouts
Users report that search functionality has become slower and less reliable since AI integration
unsupported_details: The claim uses plural 'Users report' implying multiple users, but only one source review explicitly mentions search becoming slower and less reliable since AI integration

faithfulness_details.claim: Users report the app has become slow to load and experiences performance issues attributed to AI features
Users report aggressive upsell messaging for paid AI features
Multiple users explicitly state they are deleting the app or migrating to other platforms due to AI integration
Users report Notion improves productivity across multiple use cases including work, school, personal organization, and collaborative team work
Users describe Notion as more versatile and capable than alternative apps like Notes and Evernote
Some users find the initial learning curve steep but ultimately valuable
A small number of users report confusion or difficulty with app setup and registration
Multiple users report the app crashes immediately on launch or fails to open, preventing any access to their work
Users report crashes occur after app updates, with one user stating a required update now causes crashes on every launch
Some users report being stuck in an onboarding tutorial loop that cannot be skipped or exited, blocking access to the app
Users report frequent crashes during active work sessions, with one user describing crashes every few minutes while writing
One user reports the mobile app introduces workflow-breaking bugs with nearly every update
Users request native drawing and handwriting features for Apple Pencil, citing competing apps like GoodNotes that offer these capabilities
Users report Apple Pencil writing does not register or appear correctly in the app
Users report Apple Pencil triggers unintended typing or selection behavior instead of scrolling
Users report that handwriting with Apple Pencil does not automatically add spaces between words
Users report the Apple Pencil Scribble function is not working
Users report multiple touches with Apple Pencil are required to activate toggle switches and other UI elements
Users report the app becomes unresponsive during editing and requires force-closing to continue working
Users report the app freezes or becomes unresponsive specifically on iPad when building pages or editing
Users report pages continuously refresh when attempting to modify content, preventing task completion
Users report scrolling locks up and requires closing and reopening the app
Users report the app crashes or searches cause crashes on mobile
At least one paying subscriber reports performance issues are disappointing and daunting given the subscription cost
Users report lag affects typing specifically, with text input becoming slow
Users report that after being logged out, all their notes and pages permanently disappear when they log back in
unsupported_details: The claim states notes and pages 'permanently disappear' but source reviews do not confirm permanence — users report loss at the time of review but do not establish that recovery is impossible
The word 'permanently' is not supported by the source reviews or statistics; some users mention trying recovery methods but none definitively state the loss is irreversible

faithfulness_details.claim: Users confirm deleted data is not recoverable from trash or through support contact
unsupported_details: The claim states 'Users confirm' (plural) but only one source review (Review 3) explicitly mentions contacting support

The claim asserts confirmation that data is 'not recoverable through support contact' as a general pattern, but only Review 3 mentions support contact outcome, making this a single anecdote rather than confirmed pattern by multiple users
Review 1 and Review 2 mention checking trash but do not mention attempting support contact, so they only partially support the 'not recoverable' aspect

faithfulness_details.claim: Some users report data loss occurring after app updates or account creation prompts
One user reports exam preparation notes disappeared with an exam in 2 days
One user reports losing over 3 years worth of work after being logged out
One user reports support stated they cannot find the disappeared workspace
Users report the mobile app is significantly harder to use than the desktop version, with several stating they actively avoid the mobile app or prefer the website
New users struggle with initial onboarding and basic tasks, with multiple users reporting they required external help from friends or YouTube to understand the app
Users report the mobile UI does not adapt well to smaller screens, with mentions of small buttons and the interface feeling like a desktop version squeezed onto mobile
Users report difficulty performing basic operations on mobile, including copy-paste functionality and creating or customizing pages
Multiple users report that basic account settings like changing display name are unavailable on mobile and require desktop access
Users report the mobile app auto-adjusts the viewport during typing such that the typing area scrolls out of view, preventing users from seeing what they type
Users report the cursor appears in incorrect positions when attempting to place it, making precise text editing impossible
Users report the mobile app intermittently blocks all text input and requires force-closing and reopening the app to restore typing functionality
One user reports external keyboard input fails in the mobile app while the system keyboard and external keyboard work correctly in other apps
One user reports switching between stylus and finger input triggers a bug that prevents further typing
Users report paying for subscriptions but the app continues to prompt for payment or block access to paid features
Users report being charged after canceling subscriptions or during attempts to cancel
Users report customer support is unresponsive or directs them to AI chat without resolution
Users report subscription purchased on mobile does not sync with web, requiring cancellation and re-subscription
Users report inability to access billing or subscription management from mobile app
Users report support refusing refunds for accidental charges or subscription errors
Users cannot access any content without an internet connection, which blocks them from viewing or editing notes they have already created
Users report losing work written while offline when they regain internet connection
Users state offline access has been requested for many years without implementation
Users cannot access their workspace in areas with poor mobile reception
Users cannot access content when Notion servers experience outages
Paid users expect offline access as part of their subscription
unsupported_details: The claim generalizes to 'users' (plural) but only one source review expresses this expectation
The claim states this as a general expectation of paid users as a group, but the evidence shows only a single user's wish

faithfulness_details.claim: Users cannot open or view templates after using the search function on iPad, with the UI breaking and preventing template selection
The template view glitches and prevents scrolling, with the keyboard remaining visible and blocking the interface
One user reports the app crashes when attempting to open a template
Users report that duplicated templates cannot be edited, with changes reverting to the original version
One user reports the UI breaks with the AI button repositioning from the bottom right to the middle of the screen
Users report being logged out repeatedly and unable to regain access to their accounts
Sign-in links sent via email redirect users back to the sign-in page instead of completing authentication
Password reset functionality fails, with users reporting expired links or no email delivery
Users report losing access to their data and paid subscriptions after being logged out
Google sign-in option fails with endless loops or non-functional buttons
Apple ID sign-in reports connection errors
Users attempting to sign in are inadvertently creating new accounts, causing account confusion
After sign-in attempts, users see error messages stating they do not have access to their content
Users report the keyboard disconnects after typing a few characters, preventing further input on iPad with Magic Keyboard or Smart Keyboard.
Multiple users report copy and paste functionality does not work on iPad.
Users report the screen jumps or scrolls unexpectedly during typing, hiding what they are writing.
Users report typing lag and delays when using the keyboard on iPad.
One user reports the cursor goes missing before typing on iPad with Magic Keyboard.
Users report the app is slow and unresponsive on iPad, with one user stating clicking on a line to edit takes a long time.
unsupported_details: The specific timeframe '20 seconds' for clicking on a line to edit does not appear verbatim in the source reviews as a verified factual duration, though it is mentioned as a user's subjective claim in Review 1

faithfulness_details.claim: One user reports reinstalling the app temporarily resolved Magic Keyboard typing issues on M4 iPad.
Users report the mobile calendar view shows only dots instead of event details, forcing repeated navigation to see tasks
Multiple users request a month view in the Notion Calendar mobile app, which is currently unavailable
unsupported_details: The claim states 'Multiple users' but only 2 source reviews explicitly mention month view requests, which does not establish the quantitative assertion of 'multiple' as a verified pattern across the dataset

faithfulness_details.claim: Users report calendar sync issues between Notion and external calendars like Google Calendar and Apple Calendar
New users report steep learning curves and confusion navigating the calendar and task creation features
Users report that navigating back from a calendar entry returns them to the month view instead of the day view they were viewing
One user reports inability to save calendar events created in the iPhone app
Users report the app becomes unresponsive or crashes when editing notes with large amounts of content, requiring force-quit and relaunch
Users report pages fail to open or take a long time to load, with some reporting 90% failure rate requiring multiple relaunch attempts
One user reports page load times before content appears
Users report the cursor disappears and interface becomes unresponsive during editing, preventing continued work
unsupported_details: Claim specifies 'cursor disappears' - this specific detail is not mentioned in the source review
Claim uses plural 'Users report' implying multiple users, but only one source review is provided as evidence
The term 'unresponsive during editing' is an interpretation; the source review states 'can't write' and 'clicking to work' which are related but not identical descriptions

faithfulness_details.claim: One user reports crashes occur after reopening a note on iOS
One paid user reports frequent failures despite upgrading to a higher plan
Users report the mobile app frequently becomes unresponsive, requiring app restart to continue work
Multiple users report text is too small and difficult to edit on mobile devices
unsupported_details: The claim states 'Multiple users report' but only 2 source reviews are provided, not a plurality that would typically constitute 'multiple users' in a meaningful way
The qualifier 'multiple' is not quantified by any literal value in the system-verified statistics

faithfulness_details.claim: Users report the mobile app lacks feature parity with desktop, limiting what they can accomplish on mobile
Users report poor touch and tablet support, including Apple Pencil incompatibility and misaligned touch targets
One user reports the screen gets pushed up when tagging someone, obscuring the text being typed
Users report the app is slow and experiences performance degradation
Users report specific editing bugs including keyboard toolbar disappearing and page reloading when using @ mentions
One user reports the app frequently signs them out automatically
Users explicitly state they love Notion on desktop but find the mobile experience frustrating enough to consider abandoning the product
Users report the app crashes on launch or becomes unresponsive immediately after opening on iOS devices
Users report the app auto-refreshes every few seconds while typing or reading, disrupting all workflows
unsupported_details: The claim states 'every few seconds' as a general timeframe, but the source reviews provide specific intervals: '5-10 seconds' (Review 1) and 'approximately every 10 seconds' (Review 2). The claim's vague 'few seconds' is not directly supported by these precise timeframes.

The claim asserts this disrupts 'all workflows' universally, but Review 3 indicates 'Some files work better than others for adding updates' and mentions it 'works well on my iPad & Mac', suggesting the issue is not universal across all workflows or devices.

faithfulness_details.claim: Users report the app freezes requiring force-quit and restart on iPad
One user reports the app enters an infinite crash-reload loop on their database view making it completely unresponsive
Users report the screen jumps to the bottom of the page during typing on iPad making input impossible
unsupported_details: The claim uses plural 'Users report' but only one source review is provided describing this specific issue

The claim states the issue 'making input impossible' - the source review says 'makes it really difficult to write anything' and 'killed the app for me', which indicates severe difficulty but not literal impossibility

faithfulness_details.claim: Users report button presses do not register or respond on iPad following recent updates
Users state the desktop version works perfectly while the iOS/iPad app is unusable
14 items originated from users in Great Britain and 14 from Canada, representing significant geographic concentration
Users repeatedly request the ability to adjust or increase font size on mobile devices, with 9 of 49 items being 1-star reviews citing this limitation

Multiple users identify font size constraints as an accessibility barrier, with one user stating their failing eyesight makes the app unusable and another describing themselves as visually handicapped
iPad users specifically request font size controls, with one user noting default font size and icons are too small on 12.9 inch iPad
Users report that iOS does not support dynamic text sizes for page content, and increasing system font size affects all apps undesirably
The request spans multiple countries, with 21 items from Canada, 13 from UK, 10 from US, and 5 from Australia
One user reports Chinese characters are particularly difficult to read at current mobile font sizes
Users cannot create columns on iPad, a feature available on desktop
Multi-column pages display poorly on iPad, with content squeezed or requiring horizontal scrolling
Drag-and-drop functionality is difficult or non-functional on iPad
Forward slash shortcuts available on desktop web are missing from iOS
Widget support is absent on iPad
iPad users report difficulty deleting database items and tables
Users report the cursor disappears when typing on iPad, particularly when editing headings
Multiple users report the iPad app lacks multi-tab or split-screen functionality available on desktop
Users report poor Apple Pencil support and difficulty interacting with touch on iPad
Users report the iPad app is missing features available on desktop including inline equations, link functionality, and form creation
One user reports the keyboard does not appear immediately or at all when tapping text boxes on iPad
One user reports slash commands do not work on iPad, specifically that typing /page or /toggle does not bring up options
Users report the app becomes stuck on a loading screen preventing access to any content
Multiple users report the issue began after a recent update
Standard troubleshooting steps including reinstalling the app and restarting devices do not resolve the issue
One user reports the app works correctly immediately after reinstalling but breaks again on subsequent launches
Users report the desktop version continues to function correctly while the mobile app fails
Multiple users request Russian language support for the app
One user requests Turkish language support
One user requests Apple Pencil scribble feature integration
Users report the app crashes or freezes when working with longer notes
Users praise the app's functionality and feature set
